headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Charles Schwab’s shares (currently trading at $89.40) have posted a disappointing 6.5% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 7.7% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: How Robinhood's Second Venture Fund Could Boost HOOD's Growth Story
summary: HOOD moves deeper into private markets with Ventures Fund II, offering retail access to early-stage startups and new revenue beyond trading.

headline: The London Company Large Cap Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: The London Company Large Cap portfolio returned 2.6% (2.4% net) during the quarter vs. a 4.2% decrease in the Russell 1000 Index. Read more here.
